name: List
description: Avatar-anchored List variant — each row carries a leading 40px [Thumbnail](../thumbnail/thumbnail.md) image (channel logo, source mark, profile photo). The sub was renamed from `thumbnail` to `image` to disambiguate the variant name from the standalone Thumbnail family — the slot still binds to a Thumbnail; the variant just names the leading-image role rather than the atom that fills it. The label column reads against the image; same click semantics as the text variant — no selection model. Single density: 40px Thumbnail + optional `supportingText` second line + optional trailing affordance per row (canonical: a `<Button variant="text" appearance="accent">` Follow on directory rows). For the richer directory shape with identity group (label + inline count Badge + optional stacked secondary line) + optional description, reach for [list/entry](./entry.md) — the canonical home for entity-row directory cases.

embedded.description: Composition mode flag. When `true` (or when the List is a direct child of `.chorus-section` / `.chorus-feed`), enters **embedded mode**: zeroes its own `background` + `padding` so chrome defers to the host. Pass explicitly inside `<Section>` / `<Feed>` for the contract to be visible in JSX; the DOM-ancestry safety net in styles.css also activates the mode when omitted. See `compositionModes` in `list.family.json`.

items.description: Array of row descriptors. Each item passes `thumbnail` props forwarded verbatim to the Thumbnail component.

container.description: Outer scroll surface. Vertical stack with a transparent fill (inherits parent container tone); rows separated by a 1px outlineVariant divider, not a gap.

row.description: Single list item. Whole row is the interactive target.

leading.description: Thumbnail at the leading edge at the 40 rung, vertically centred against the label column. Forwarded verbatim from item.thumbnail. `omittedBehavior: error` because every row in this variant MUST carry a thumbnail (use list/text or list/nav when no leading image is needed). `fallbackOnMissingSrc` is the dim-tone fill the Thumbnail paints when `src` is empty / fails to load — at scaffold time, agents fill `src` with `/placeholder.png` rather than relying on the fallback.

label.description: Primary row text. 16px / Regular / onSurface. Single line; truncates with ellipsis.

supportingText.description: Secondary line under label. 14px / Regular / onSurfaceVariant, sits directly under the label with no extra gap.

trailingIcon.description: 16px node at the trailing edge. Consumer-supplied. Accepts a decorative icon, a toggle button (favorite / mute / pin), or a small text button (Follow / Invite). Taps on the trailing slot stop propagating before they reach the row's `onClick` — the slot is a separate hit target so the consumer can wire its own action without committing the row.

thumbnail.description: Forwarded to Thumbnail verbatim (`src`, `alt`, optional `updateDot`, optional `logoBadge`).

trailingIcon.description: Trailing-edge node. Wrapped in a slot that stops click propagation so the slot is its own hit target separate from the row's `onClick`.

divider.description: Per-row bottom-divider opt-out. Pass `divider: false` to suppress the hairline `outlineVariant` rule beneath the row; the row's footprint and inline padding stay unchanged. Reach for it when a visual group ends mid-stack and the divider would visually fence off the next group from its label (e.g. a sectioned directory where the host paints a group header between two sub-stacks). The last row already omits its divider via `:not(:last-child)`.

strong.description: Per-row label-emphasis opt-in (family-wide contract — see [list.md § Cross-sub contract](./list.md)). When `true`, the row's label weight promotes from `body.md` Regular (400) to `label.lg` Semibold (600) at the same 16px size and line-height. Only the glyph stroke thickens. Use sparingly to mark one primary row inside a denser scan.

forcedState.description: Docs-only — pins the row to a single visual state via `data-force-state`. Not for production use.

sizing.dividerPerRowOptOut: Pass `divider: false` on a row to suppress its bottom divider.

focusIndicator.description: Keyboard-focus visual — an accessibility indicator, not a lifecycle state. Composes over whichever lifecycle state the row is in.
focusIndicator.compositionReason: Rows tile the column flush with only a hairline `outlineVariant` divider between them; an outward ring would overlap the divider and the neighbouring row.

ring.outerLayerPosition: depth 0..2px from the row edge (the outer stroke)
ring.insetLayerPosition: depth 2..3px from the row edge (the counter-ring just inside the outer stroke)
ring.implementation: inset box-shadow on the row's `::before` overlay (the `::after` carries the inter-row divider). Constrained strictly inside the row's footprint and never exceeds it.

focusIndicator.trigger: :focus-visible (keyboard / programmatic focus, never plain mouse click)

behavior.keyboardNavigation: Arrow up/down moves focus between rows. Home and End jump to first / last.
behavior.rowClickTarget: Whole row is clickable when an `onClick` is bound to the item. The thumbnail is never a separate hit target.
behavior.truncationNotWrap: Both label and supportingText truncate; the row never grows to fit long text.

forbidden: thumbnail slot omitted — the variant requires a thumbnail leading slot
thumbnail rendered as a raw outside the chorus-thumbnail slot wrapper
thumbnail size different from the row's intrinsic 40 rung

compact directory rows (32 avatar + inline count + optional toggle) built as a list/image — that pattern is [list/entry](./entry.md) at `size="small"`; list/image is single-density at the 40 rung with no count slot
